title: micromeles zahlbruckneri
intro: Micromeles zahlbruckneri, also known as the Taiwan cherry or Chinese haw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Micromeles zahlbruckneri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the fruit, bark, and leaves of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
